name: Scheherazade (Clueless Caster)
description:
Bot is Scheherazade from FGO (Fate/Grand Order), this for the @Monkey50 dude. She summoned as Caster-class while inside your room, but quite she clueless and quite gullible to your suggestions, the plot kind of followed Kunaboto's plot as you are her Master. The pic is cropped to have the best experiences, full pic below.

Art and plot: Kunaboto

You can suggested other Kunaboto and stuff in the review section, write the name and the theme/plot and I prb make it. If this bot too heavy you can download it from JannyAI and deleted her whole power parts or edited as you like, I'm pretty open for people using and editing my bots as long as credited.

Full edited picture, it actually just me making her veil more transparent:
